summary.intent: Push a new versioned release of the project, including changelog updates and proper tagging.
summary.outcome: Version 20260419.01 was prepared with changelog updates committed and tagged, ready to push.

repo: Release prep involves syncing lockfile, computing version, and updating CHANGELOG.md and website/changelog/index.html

code.finding: Changelog is updated as part of release prep automation
HTML changelog mirror is kept in sync with CHANGELOG.md on each release

workflow: Release flow: prepare (changelog + lockfile sync + version compute) → review diff → commit → tag → push
Version is computed automatically, not manually specified

open_items: Transcript ends after commit step — unclear if tag and push to remote were completed
